notes:
Greetings Governor,
We plan to update the game to version 1.1.08: Starlit Blaze on 【UTC 2026/6/3 06:00】. The servers will be down for an estimated 【3 hours】 during the update. We apologize for any inconvenience this might cause and will send you a reward as compensation once the update is complete.

=Summer Solstice Event Series=
Firefly lantern bright, light up the midsummer night. The Summer Solstice event series is coming soon, and we have prepared exciting content for you to enjoy:
1) Midsum

title: Archero 2
notes:
1. Added Legendary Heroes Demeter and Artemis and exclusive Skins.
2. Added Guild Raid, Camp Visit, Friendly Duel, Charm System, Titles, and Rankings.
3. Rumble Ladder S3 begins with the new 3v3 Football Rumble mode.
4. Added Gear & Rune Lock
5. Unlocked Shackled Jungle 1101-1300, Campaign 161-170, and Hard 146-155.
6. Added defensive bonuses in Peak Arena.
7. Improved Guild Expedition stats, event chat, and scoring.
8. Reduced chapter difficulty and fixed various issues.

title: Samkok: Blood Oath
notes: Internationalization adaptation and rendering optimization

title: ONE PUNCH MAN: The Strongest
notes:
1. Server merge.
2. [Mirage Store] The weekly exchange limit for rare gems has been adjusted to 2x.
3. Other optimizations and adjustments.

title: RP Grand

title: Love and Deepspace
notes:
Love and Deepspace Version 6.0 [A Shattered Quiet] is now available!

[Home System Update]
-New [Room] is now open, with [Cooking] and [Handicraft] features now available. Cook delicious meals and craft special items with him, capturing every precious moment of everyday life together.
-New features including [Design Mode], [Pose Mode], and [My Mood] are now available, along with a richer [Weather] system, a more relaxing [Gardening] experience, and multiple optimizations.
-Shared Meals, Shared S

title: Lumina Saga M
notes:
1. Fixed some known bugs, improved game stability, and ensured a smooth experience.
2. Optimized system performance, reduced loading time, and made the game run more smoothly.
